creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Registered a 'freebsd' project and 'freebsd' username on the https://n.tkte.ch (notifico) IRC notification service as a temporary measure until we can deploy an service that takes GitHub hooks/POST's and processes them.

Currently, freebsd base, ports and docs are announcing push events to the #freebsd-pulse channel on freenode IRC network
